description: Astral builds Python developer tools, including uv for package and project management, Ruff for linting and formatting, and ty for type checking and language-server functionality. Its public site and docs focus on downloadable command-line tools rather than hosted developer APIs.
summary: Astral exposes public developer-tool CLIs for uv, Ruff, and ty; no public HTTP/REST API, GraphQL API, or MCP server documentation was found on astral.sh or docs.astral.sh.
